nodes.name: Retell Webhook
nodes.notes: Shares the same Retell webhook as the call logger. In n8n, multiple workflows can listen on the same webhook path — or use n8n's webhook trigger with routing.

nodes.name: Only booked calls
nodes.notes: Only proceed when a booking was made. Tweak the condition based on how your Retell agent signals a successful booking in the analysis data.

nodes.name: Extract patient details
nodes.notes:
Extracts patient details from the Retell call analysis.

For best results, configure your Retell agent with a custom data collection schema:
  patientName, patientEmail, appointmentType, insurance_flag, insurer
These appear in call.call_analysis.custom_analysis_data.

nodes.name: Upsert patient record
nodes.notes:
Posts to /api/pipeline/run on the StrydeOS app, which handles patient creation/update.

Required env vars:
  APP_URL — your Vercel deployment URL (e.g. https://strydeos.vercel.app)
  N8N_COMMS_WEBHOOK_SECRET — shared secret for authentication

meta.description:
Creates or updates a patient record in Firestore when Ava books a new appointment.

Required env vars:
  RETELL_CLINIC_ID         — Firestore clinic document ID
  APP_URL                  — StrydeOS Vercel URL
  N8N_COMMS_WEBHOOK_SECRET — shared auth secret

Optional improvement: configure Retell agent with a custom data extraction schema
so patient name, email, insurance info appear in call_analysis.custom_analysis_data.
